credentialRequirements.name: GIT_HOSTING_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: Git hosting provider token (GitHub PAT, GitLab token) for push and CI triggering
credentialRequirements.obtainedFrom: GitHub Settings — Developer settings — Personal access tokens

credentialRequirements.name: CI_RUNNER_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: CI runner token for triggering pipeline after push
credentialRequirements.obtainedFrom: CI platform (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI) — project settings

approvalGate.blockedReason: Repository completion rollout requires GIT_HOSTING_TOKEN with push access and PR creation permissions. No credentials supplied in proof pass.
requiredUserActions: Supply GIT_HOSTING_TOKEN with repo write and PR creation scope
Confirm CI pipeline configuration matches completion changes
Review and approve the completion PR before merging

providerAdapters.commandTemplate: git push origin main (with GIT_HOSTING_TOKEN as credential)
gh workflow run deploy.yml (requires GIT_HOSTING_TOKEN with workflow scope)

secretPolicyChecks.description: No .env files with real credential values committed to source
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No committed .env files with real credential values detected for dirty_repo_completion

secretPolicyChecks.description: Environment variable manifest (.env.example or app.config.json) is present
All required credentials declare mustNotBeCommitted=true for secrets
secretPolicyChecks.detail: mustNotBeCommitted=true is declared for all secret-class credentials in the credential manifest.

secretPolicyChecks.description: No hardcoded secret patterns (API keys, JWT tokens, AWS keys) found in source files
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No hardcoded secret patterns detected in dirty_repo_completion source files

caveat: This manifest declares credential requirements for approved credentialed deployment. No credentials are stored, validated, or used in this proof pass. Live deployment is blocked by default and requires explicit user approval and user-supplied credentials.
